article.title: Roblox Adds Youth Accounts as Push for Social Media Bans Grows
article.summary: Roblox Corp. is for the first time introducing special accounts designed specifically for younger children and teens, as the company tries to head off the possibility of being swept up by various social media bans under consideration globally.
article.title_zh: Roblox 推出青少年帳戶，應對全球社群媒體禁令浪潮
article.summary_zh: Roblox Corp. 首次推出專為年幼兒童和青少年設計的特殊帳戶，以應對全球各地可能的社群媒體禁令。

article.title: Dell, HP Inc. Shares Jump on Acquisition Speculation Report
article.summary: Shares of Dell Technologies Inc. and HP Inc. jumped after a report from website SemiAccurate that Nvidia Corp. was seeking an acquisition that would “reshape the PC landscape.”
article.title_zh: Dell 和 HP Inc. 股價因收購猜測報導而上漲
article.summary_zh: 在 SemiAccurate 網站報導 Nvidia 尋求收購以「重塑 PC 格局」後，Dell Technologies Inc. 和 HP Inc. 的股價上漲。

article.title: Claude Managed Agents上線　AI代理部署不再是工程難題
article.summary: Anthropic推出人工智慧代理（AI agent）託管平台Claude Managed Agents，與OpenAI Frontier打對台，讓開發者無需自行搭建複雜後端系統，只需專注於設計代理任務。Managed Agents產品核心是一套代理框架...
article.title_zh: Claude Managed Agents上線　AI代理部署不再是工程難題
article.summary_zh: Anthropic推出Claude Managed Agents託管平台，讓開發者無需自行搭建複雜後端系統，只需專注於設計代理任務。

article.title: The foldable redesign we’ve been waiting to see from Samsung and Apple is already here
article.summary: Credit: HUAWEI TL;DR HUAWEI has officially revealed the Pura X Max, a wide foldable phone that ditches the tall design seen on current devices. The Pura X Max is expected to feature a 7.69-inch inner display and a 5.5-inch outer screen, closely matching the dimensions of the so-called Galaxy Z Fold 8 Wide. By launching first, HUAWEI has beaten Samsung and Apple to defining the next new foldable form factor. We’ve gotten very used to tall and narrow foldable phone designs over the past few years, but 2026 is shaping up to be the year that flips that script. With Apple and Samsung both expected to embrace wider foldable designs , the industry is clearly heading in a new direction. But before either one of them could make their move, another competitor has already shown its hand.
article.title_zh: 我們期待已久的可摺疊手機重新設計已經來自 HUAWEI 和 Apple
article.summary_zh: HUAWEI 正式推出了 Pura X Max，這是一款寬屏可摺疊手機，採用了不同於現有設備的設計。Pura X Max 預計搭載 7.69 英寸內屏和 5.5 英寸外屏。

article.summary: 你的 AI agent，是否應該被視為一名員工，甚至為它付費取得軟體的使用資格？ 已宣布將在今年中旬退休的微軟 […]

article.title: 雲端AI ASIC戰火延伸　中系業者強化平台布局、台系IC設計服務面臨潛在壓力
article.summary: 在生成式AI持續推升算力需求之際，雲端客製化AI晶片（AI ASIC）已成為全球半導體競爭的核心戰場之一。中國最大IC設計服務業者芯原近期釋出訊號，正加速由雲端延伸至終端AI ASIC解決方案平台，積極卡位下一波...
article.title_zh: 雲端AI ASIC戰火延伸　中系業者強化平台布局、台系IC設計服務面臨潛在壓力
article.summary_zh: 在生成式AI持續推升算力需求之際，雲端客製化AI晶片（AI ASIC）已成為全球半導體競爭的核心戰場之一。中國最大IC設計服務業者芯原近期釋出訊號，正加速由雲端延伸至終端AI ASIC解決方案平台，積極卡位下一波...

article.title: Approvals for Nvidia and AMD AI chip exports to China stall under government bottleneck — 20% staff turnover hobbles Bureau of Industry and Security
article.summary: Staffing at the U.S. Commerce Department office that vets exports of Nvidia and AMD AI accelerators has collapsed over the past year.
article.title_zh: Nvidia和AMD AI晶片對華出口批准停滯——政府瓶頸導致工業安全局20%員工流失
article.summary_zh: 美國商務部負責審查Nvidia和AMD AI加速器出口的部門在過去一年內人員配置大幅下降。

article.title: Tax hikes bring new headwinds for China's telcos
article.summary: After a flat 2025, China's operators are getting hit by higher taxes and tougher cloud competition in 2026.
article.title_zh: 稅收上升為中國電信運營商帶來新逆風
article.summary_zh: 在 2025 年持平後，中國運營商在 2026 年面臨更高稅負和雲計算競爭加劇的衝擊。

article.title: AI Agents Are Coming for Your Dating Life
article.summary: The developers of Pixel Societies are using AI agents to simulate social interactions. It's an attempt optimize the process of choosing new colleagues, friends, and even romantic partners.
article.title_zh: AI 代理即將進入你的約會生活
article.summary_zh: Pixel Societies 的開發者正使用 AI 代理來模擬社交互動，試圖優化選擇新同事、朋友甚至浪漫伴侶的過程。

article.title: Meta spins up AI version of Mark Zuckerberg to engage with employees
article.summary: Meta is building an artificial intelligence version of Mark Zuckerberg that can engage with employees in his stead, as part of a broader push to remake the Big Tech company around AI. The $1.6 trillion group has been working on developing photorealistic, AI-powered 3D characters that users can interact with in real time, according to four people familiar with the matter. The company recently began prioritizing a Zuckerberg AI character, three of the people said. Read full article Comments
article.title_zh: Meta 推出 Mark Zuckerberg 的 AI 版本與員工互動
article.summary_zh: Meta 正在開發 Mark Zuckerberg 的人工智能版本，以代替他與員工互動，這是該公司圍繞 AI 進行全面改造的一部分。這家市值 1.6 兆美元的科技巨頭一直在開發逼真的 AI 驅動 3D 角色。

article.title: Latest Galaxy Watch update could be a drain on battery, according to user reports
article.summary: Users are reporting faster-than-normal battery drain on their Galaxy Watches, with some reporting it occurred after a recent update. Others suggest it’s a Google Play Services issue. more…
article.title_zh: 最新 Galaxy Watch 更新可能導致電池耗電加速
article.summary_zh: 用戶反映 Galaxy Watch 在最近更新後出現異常快速的電池耗電，部分使用者認為可能與 Google Play Services 相關。

article.title: FT: ‘Meta Builds AI Version of Mark Zuckerberg to Interact With Staff’
article.title_zh: FT：「Meta 開發 Mark Zuckerberg AI 版本與員工互動」
